pr.title: Add ExamTopics AZ-104 Q1–Q20 question bank and surface it in Course Modules
pr.body:
Extracts 20 real ExamTopics AZ-104 Topic 1 questions into a structured static database and wires them into the Course Modules page with interactive reveal-on-click behaviour.

## Data layer
- **`examtopics-data.json`** — canonical JSON database; 20 questions (Q1–Q20), each with `id`, `topic`, optional `note`, full `question` text, `options[]`, `answer` (letter), `answerIndex` (0-based), `communityVote`, `explanation`, and `discussion: []`
- **`examtopics-data.js`** — thin `window.EXAMTOPICS_DATA = ...` wrapper; matches the existing `quiz-data.js` / `course-data.js` loader pattern so no `fetch()` is needed on a static host

```js
// schema per question
{
  id: 12, topic: 1,
  question: "...",
  options: ["Geo-redundant storage", "Read-only geo-redundant storage", ...],
  answer: "B", answerIndex: 1,
  communityVote: "B (76%)",
  explanation: "RA-GRS satisfies all three requirements...",
  discussion: []
}
```

## UI — Course Modules page (`modules.js`)
- Appends an **"ExamTopics Practice Questions"** card after the five domain study cards
- Each question is an accordion row: Q-number badge + truncated title → expands to full question + options
- **Reveal Answer** button highlights the correct option green, dims wrong ones, then shows the explanation block and community vote percentage
- `discussion[]` is rendered per question — empty state shows a placeholder; ready for future comment injection

## HTML
- `index.html` loads `examtopics-data.js` alongside the other data scripts
pr.author: Copilot
